scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d='dist/assets';let h=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8');for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const c=fs.readFileSync(d+'/'+f,'utf8');const e=f.replace(/\./g,'\\.');if(f.endsWith('.js'))h=h.replace(new RegExp('<script[^>]*'+e+'[^>]*></script>'),()=>'<script type=module>'+c.split('</script>').join('<\\/script>')+'</script>');else if(f.endsWith('.css'))h=h.replace(new RegExp('<link[^>]*'+e+'[^>]*>'),()=>'<style>'+c+'</style>');}fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h);fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true});"
